productDisplayName: Skechers Women Double Agent Black Sandals
description: Stylish and uber cool, these Ready Set Go-Double agent floaters from the Tone-ups colletion of skechers add an extra bounce to your step. With a simple strappy design in attractive colors, these sandals are designed to activate your calf, thigh and buttock muscles. Look super stylish in these comfortable floaters all day long. Upper Woven straps on the forefoot, ankle and back of ankle for a simple design Velcro closures on the forefoot and ankle for a snug Fit Tone-ups tab on the ankle strap Midsole Cushioned footbed in an ergonomic desing for all day comfort Outsole Kinetic toning pods on the forefoot and the heel help create bi-axial natural instability with every step and therefore activates underused muscles to maintain balance Durale high abrasion rubber outsole provides traction control at bi-axial natural instability contact points Herringbone ridges on the outsole for improved traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
